testcase.name: testInvalidLogin

testcase.name: abbrevSearch

failure.message: Abbreviation 'jjk' did not match 'Jujutsu Kaisen' – Crunchyroll does not support abbreviation search expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Abbreviation 'jjk' did not match 'Jujutsu Kaisen' – Crunchyroll does not support abbreviation search expected [true] but found [false] at TestCases.SearchTest.abbrevSearch(SearchTest.java:145) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at org.example.Main.main(Main.java:25) ... Removed 25 stack frames
